_comment: Voice profiles for F5-TTS zero-shot cloning. ref_text MUST match exactly what is spoken in the .wav file. Empty ref_text triggers Whisper auto-transcription (adds ~3s latency — avoid in production). Recommended reference audio: 10-30s, clear speech, no background noise, WAV 44.1kHz mono.

ane.recording_notes: Fill ref_text with the exact words spoken in ane.wav after recording

mikel.recording_notes: Fill ref_text with the exact words spoken in mikel.wav after recording

_example_with_ref_text.ref_text: Kaixo, nire izena Ane da. Klinika dentalean laguntzeko prest nago.
_example_with_ref_text.description: Example showing how ref_text should look
